title: REQUEST Evangelion PianoForte 1 Sheet Music Scans PDF
display_title: REQUEST Evangelion PianoForte 1 Sheet Music Scans PDF
wikitext:
[]: REQUEST: "Evangelion PianoForte #1" Sheet Music Scans/PDF             Quote Post by aboose » Wed Mar 16, 2022 4:24 am Hello, There is a sheet music collection for Eva songs with jazz stylings. I consider it to be the most high quality sheet music for a lot of Eva tracks. https://www.play-asia.com/evangelion-pi ... /13/70dlz7 It's out of print and on ebay its going for $400+ for a used copy. I was wondering if anyone had a scanned PDF version of these sheets. I believe that they are worth preserving. Thank you.

[]: Re: REQUEST: "Evangelion PianoForte #1" Sheet Music Scans/PDF             Quote Post by kaw0000 » Wed Jun 08, 2022 10:49 am Found it! https://archive.org/details/EVANGELION-piano-forte audio: [Link removed: pirated content] - JoelcrNeto
